final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input load,
    input [3:0] parallel_in,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (load) begin
        q <= parallel_in;
    end else begin
        q <= {q[2:0], 1'b0};
    end
end

endmodule
